particulars.description: All estates and other interests in freehold, leasehold and/or unregistered immovable property wheresoever situate now or hereafter belonging to the mortgagor (including without limitation all the freehold land and buildings known as: (I) 14 park road, kingston upon thames KT2 6BG and registered at hm land egistry with title absolute under title number TGL63104; (ii) land on the east side of park road, kingston upon thames and registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number SGL231932; and (iii) land on the east side of park road, kingston upon thames and registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number SGL226749 and all buildings fixtures and fittings (including trade fixtures and fittings) and fixed plant and machinery from time to time on any such freehold leasehold and other immovable property.

All the freehold land and buildings known as:. (I)14 park road, kingston upon thames KT2 6BG and registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number TGL63104;. (Ii) land on the east side of park road, kingston upon thames and registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number SGL231932; and. (Iii) land on the east side of park road, kingston upon thames and registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number SGL226749.
All that freehold property situate and known as 14 park road, kingston upon thames (KT2 6BG) registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number TGL63104.

All freehold and leasehold property now vested in the company together with all buildings fixtures (including trade fixtures) and fixed plant and machinery from time to time on that property and all other estates or interests in any freehold and leasehold property of the company now and in the future vested in the company together with all buildings fixtures (including trade fixtures) and fixed plant and machinery from time to time on that property.
